_invariant: USDC SVB depeg (2023-03-10/11) used to test DIRECTIONAL DEDUP: a depeg that WORSENS across polls must RE-PAGE; a depeg that holds steady must be dedup-SUPPRESSED (no alert spam). This GRAPH is representative/host-fed and held CONSTANT across all polls (only the injected price + `now` change) so any difference in the last poll's emitted set is attributable purely to the dedup engine. Per-poll PRICES are MEASURED on-chain from the Curve 3pool get_dy(USDC->USDT) at each poll's block (snapshots/fidelity.json). RE-ANCHORED: the on-chain 3pool dislocation LAGGED the CEX evening print by ~4h, so the polls were moved into the Mar-11 02:00-07:00Z window where the labelled tiers (WARN soft depeg ~0.975 @02:00-03:00Z / deep low ~0.878 @07:00Z) are actually true on-chain. snapshot_block 16803216 = 2023-03-11T07:00:00Z = the case-1 graded deep-low block.
